subcodes.first_line: O son of the Kingdom! How noble is man, should he walk in the pathway of his Lord, and how surpassing fair [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابن ملکوت انسان چه قدر بزرگوار است اگر در ره پروردگار بپوید و چه قدر جمیل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
